aesthetic: Swiss Precision — weight-300 elegance, prismatic gradients, mathematical whitespace
principles: Weight 300 is the brand voice — lightness as luxury
Mathematical whitespace: every gap is intentional
Blue-tinted shadows: rgba(50,50,93,0.25) — even shadows are on-brand
Numbers are visual anchors: 3× larger than body text
One accent element per page — surgical restraint
promptGuide: Apply the Swiss Precision aesthetic: weight-300 headlines (never 400+), deep navy #061b31 text (not pure black), single #533afd accent per page, blue-tinted dual shadows (rgba(50,50,93,0.25) + rgba(0,0,0,0.1)), letter-spacing tightens with size (-0.025em at 56px). Copy is terse: ≤8 words per headline, no exclamations, no 'we'. Numbers dominate with tabular-nums.
